parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in 220-260 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: Your class has attended a seminar about which areas of scientific research most deserve public funding. You have made the notes below. Write an essay discussing two of the ideas in your notes. You should explain which area deserves priority, giving reasons to support your opinion.

stimulus.title: Which areas of scientific research most deserve public funding?
stimulus.body:
• research into preventing and curing disease
• research into clean energy and the climate
• the exploration of space

Some opinions expressed in the seminar:
"Every other achievement means little to someone who is seriously ill."
"There is no point curing patients on a planet that is burning."
"The technologies we use every day began as 'useless' space research."

bullets: give reasons to support your opinion

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in 220-260 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: Your city council wants to bring science to the public and has invited proposals for a science festival.

stimulus.title: Proposal: a city science festival
stimulus.body: Write a proposal for a weekend science festival aimed at people who would never normally attend a science event. Describe the activities you recommend, explain how you would reach audiences beyond schools and universities, and outline what the city would gain.

bullets: how you would reach new audiences

tasks.lead: An English-language student journal has invited reviews of popular science books.

stimulus.title: Popular science reviews wanted
stimulus.body: Review a popular science book you have read. Describe the questions it tackles, assess how well it explains difficult ideas to non-specialists without distorting them, and say who should read it.

bullets: how well it explains difficult ideas without distorting them

tasks.lead: Your college principal has noticed falling attendance at the college science club and has asked you to write a report.

stimulus.title: Report: the college science club
stimulus.body: Write a report explaining why participation in the science club has declined, describing what students say they would want from it, and recommending how the club should change to win members back.
